user.title: Flow Power HA
user.description: Select your electricity price data source.

flowpower_api_key.title: Flow Power API
flowpower_api_key.description: Enter the API key from the Flow Power app under More > Web Data Access.

flowpower_site.title: Flow Power Site
flowpower_site.description: Select the residential site to use for account pricing summary data.

flowpower_nmi.title: Flow Power Account Site
flowpower_nmi.description: Automatic residential site discovery was unavailable. Enter the NMI from your electricity bill to enable PEA, LWAP, TWAP, and account sensors, or leave it blank to continue with price-only sensors.

region.title: NEM Region
region.description: Select your National Electricity Market region.

tariff.title: Electricity Distributor
tariff.description: Select your electricity distributor to enable time-of-use pricing. Skip to use a flat base rate.

tariff_code.title: Tariff Code
tariff_code.description: Select your {network} tariff code. This is usually listed on your electricity bill under 'tariff' or 'network tariff'. You can also look it up at: {tariff_url}

pricing.title: Pricing Configuration
pricing.description: Configure your Flow Power pricing settings. Enter rates as they appear in your PDS (GST inclusive).

data_description.base_rate: Your Flow Power base energy rate (GST inclusive)
data_description.pea_enabled: Apply Price Efficiency Adjustment using raw wholesale TWAP with available Flow Power account GST, BPEA, and network tariff inputs
data_description.pea_custom_value: Override calculated PEA with a fixed value
data_description.fp_twap_override: Override the rolling raw wholesale TWAP with a fixed value. Leave empty for automatic pricing.
data_description.happy_hour_export_rate: Optional override for plans with a non-standard Happy Hour export rate

error.invalid_tariff: Could not load tariff data for the selected network and tariff code
error.no_sites: No Flow Power sites or price data were available for this API key

init.title: Flow Power Settings
init.description: Adjust your pricing configuration. Enter rates as they appear in your PDS (GST inclusive).

data.flowpower_api_key: Flow Power Web Data API Key

data_description.flowpower_api_key: Leave blank to keep the currently saved key.
data_description.flowpower_nmi: Used for PEA, LWAP, TWAP, demand, and account sensors. Enter the NMI from your electricity bill if automatic site discovery did not find it.

flowpower_site_options.title: Flow Power Site
flowpower_site_options.description: Select the residential site to use for account pricing summary data.

options_tariff_code.title: Tariff Code
options_tariff_code.description: Select your {network} tariff code. This is usually listed on your electricity bill under 'tariff' or 'network tariff'. You can also look it up at: {tariff_url}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Flow Power API
error.invalid_site: The NMI did not return Flow Power account summary data
error.no_sites: No Flow Power sites or price data were available for this API key

web_data_api_required.title: Flow Power Web Data API key required
web_data_api_required.description: Flow Power has retired automated customer-portal access. Your portal credentials and session cookies were removed. In the Flow Power app, go to **More > Web Data Access**, copy the API key, then open **Settings > Devices & Services > Flow Power HA > Configure** and enter it. AEMO-direct pricing continues while the key is missing, but Flow Power API prices and account metrics are unavailable.
